segments.text: And here we go with the first Top 8 match!
segments.original_text: ここで始まりますトップ8最初の試合
開幕は戦場から見ていきます
これ選んだのはおそらくグラトニー側でしょうかね

segments.text: I figured a stage with platforms where you could reset pressure from the top would be ideal
segments.original_text: なるべく台があって上から上で一息つけるようなステージがいいかなと思って

segments.text: Brings it down to two right there—
segments.original_text: ホットリングで下まで2回で

segments.text: Right, that's exactly what I'm saying—they need to properly shut down that low recovery
segments.original_text: いやこれですよまさに言ってたその下からの復帰をちゃんと潰すっていう

segments.text: Despite going all-in diving inside and going for the tech
segments.original_text: わざわざ内側に潜り込んでバイクを出したにも関わらず

segments.text: Even though they pulled it out again here
segments.original_text: バイクをここでも出したにも関わらず

full_text: And here we go with the first Top 8 match! Dro-right versus Gluttony. Starting us off with Battlefield. I see. Gluttony probably picked this one. I figured a stage with platforms where you could reset pressure from the top would be ideal. Wait, the top? Brings it down to two right there— Right, that's exactly what I'm saying—they need to properly shut down that low recovery. Despite going all-in diving inside and going for the tech. Even though they pulled it out again here. Let me say something.
